description:
You are acting as a database administrator who has been asked to tweak two existing configuration files so that query execution is faster.  
Everything you need is already under the directory  
  /home/user/configs  

1. YAML file to edit: /home/user/configs/db_config.yaml  
   • Change the value of performance.query_caching from **false** to **true**.  
   • Change the value of performance.cache_size from **128MB** to **256MB**.  

2. TOML file to edit: /home/user/configs/query_optimizer.toml  
   • Change max_parallel_workers from **2** to **4**.  
   • Change enable_hashagg from **false** to **true**.  
   (Leave all other keys exactly as-is.)  

3. After updating both files, create a plain-text change log named  
   /home/user/configs/changes_log.txt  

The log MUST follow this exact four-line format (no extra spaces or blank lines):  
db_config.yaml: performance.query_caching = true  
db_config.yaml: performance.cache_size = 256MB  
query_optimizer.toml: max_parallel_workers = 4  
query_optimizer.toml: enable_hashagg = true  

The automated test will verify:  
• The two configuration files exist at the paths above.  
• Their non-changed lines remain byte-for-byte identical to the originals.  
• The four key/value pairs have the new values.  
• The change log exists and its contents match the four lines above exactly.  

You only need about two or three shell commands to finish everything (open-edit-save style is fine), and you do NOT need root privileges.
truth:
Initial files already present before the agent starts:

1. /home/user/configs/db_config.yaml  
Contents (11 lines):
# Database configuration
connection:
  host: localhost
  port: 5432
  user: admin
  password: admin123
performance:
  query_caching: false
  cache_size: 128MB

2. /home/user/configs/query_optimizer.toml  
Contents (5 lines):
# Query optimizer settings
max_parallel_workers = 2
enable_hashagg = false
enable_bitmapscan = true

Target state after successful completion:

A. /home/user/configs/db_config.yaml  
Contents (11 lines):
# Database configuration
connection:
  host: localhost
  port: 5432
  user: admin
  password: admin123
performance:
  query_caching: true
  cache_size: 256MB

B. /home/user/configs/query_optimizer.toml  
Contents (5 lines):
# Query optimizer settings
max_parallel_workers = 4
enable_hashagg = true
enable_bitmapscan = true

C. /home/user/configs/changes_log.txt  
Exact 4-line content (including line breaks, no trailing spaces):
db_config.yaml: performance.query_caching = true
db_config.yaml: performance.cache_size = 256MB
query_optimizer.toml: max_parallel_workers = 4
query_optimizer.toml: enable_hashagg = true
name: task_000000_1555b2ec
